title: Delhi High Court quashes Look Out Circulars against Prannoy Roy and Radhika Roy in CBI cases
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday quashed the Look Out Circulars issued against former NDTV promoters Prannoy Roy and Radhika Roy in connection with two cases registered by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI). Justice Sachin Datta passed the order."The impugned LOC is quashed subject to the petitioners cooperating with the investigation," Justice Sachin Datta said.Justice Sachin DattaThe High Court was told that the Look Out Circulars (LOC) were issued against the couple at the behest of the
